---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Thoughts on AI chatbots, distress, and suicide research."
listing:
  contents: blog-posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
